claims.statement: derive creates a PBEKeySpec from password, salt, iterations, and keyLengthBits.
claims.source_quote: PBEKeySpec keySpec = new PBEKeySpec(password, salt, iterations, keyLengthBits);

claims.statement: derive obtains a SecretKeyFactory instance using KDF_ALGORITHM.
derive returns the encoded bytes of the generated secret.
derive clears the password from keySpec in a finally block.

entities.name: derive
entities.description: Method that derives key bytes from a password and salt.

entities.name: clearPassword
entities.description: Method call used to clear password data from a PBEKeySpec.

entities.name: generateSecret
entities.description: Method call used to generate a secret key from a key specification.

entities.name: getEncoded
entities.description: Method call used to obtain encoded key bytes.

entities.name: getInstance
entities.description: Method call used to obtain a SecretKeyFactory instance.

relations.description: derive calls getInstance to obtain a SecretKeyFactory.
derive calls generateSecret to derive a secret key.
derive calls getEncoded to return key bytes.
derive calls clearPassword in the finally block.
